Class ObjectConverter<T>

java.lang.Object
com.shanebeestudios.skbee.api.util.ObjectConverter<T>
Type Parameters:
T - ClassInfo class for conversion type
public abstract class ObjectConverter<T> extends Object
Util class to convert NamespacedKeys to Skript objects.
